hallucinations.description: Multiple references cite nonexistent papers with fabricated arXiv IDs and future publication years (2025-2026). Examples include DeepWeightFlow (arXiv:2601.05052, 2026), Scale Equivariant Graph Metanetworks (arXiv:2510.08300, 2025), and Text2Weight (arXiv:2508.13633, 2025). These cannot be verified and appear invented to support the narrative.
hallucinations.evidence: References section: [1] S. Gupta et al., 'DeepWeightFlow...', arXiv:2601.05052, 2026; [2] B. Kuipers et al., arXiv:2510.08300, 2025; [3] B. Tian et al., arXiv:2508.13633, 2025.

overall_assessment: The paper contains hallucinations in the form of nonexistent citations. The methodology description, experimental setup, and reported results (including tables and figures) are consistent with the provided source code and execution outputs, with no evidence of faked results, mathematical errors, or hallucinated methodology.
